relationships: ber:Ulac ccek dakken tellamt tzemremt ad tgemt aya xir n wakken ay t-tgamt
ber:Sanda i tellamt tzemremt ad teddumt﹖
ber:Tzemremt, akken ma tellamt, ad teqqimemt, ur tettewliwilemt ara﹖
ber:Ad awent-d-iseɣ tapizza akken ma tellamt
ber:Yenna-as Tom dakken tellamt tzedɣemt deg Boston
ber:Ad awent-ixelleṣ tapizza akken ma tellamt
ber:Teɣsemt ad d-tinimt maci mgal waya ay tellamt﹖
ber:D acu n tutlayt ay tellamt tessawalemt-tt﹖ D tamaziɣt
ber:D acu ay tellamt tettgemt deg Tmurt n Yizwawen﹖
ber:Tebɣamt ad d-tinimt maci mgal waya ay tellamt﹖
ber:Acḥal seg wasmi i tellamt d timburin﹖
ber:Acḥal aya seg wasmi ay tellamt da﹖
ber:Akken ma tellamt tgamt amahil yelhan
ber:Anect ay tellamt kennemti d Timaziɣin ay lliɣ ula d nekk
